headline: Southwest Airlines Dropped 20.89% in a Month as $104 Oil Threatens Its $4.00 EPS Target
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) entered 2026 with its most sweeping operational overhaul in the carrier’s history, only to see shares slide 22% over the past month as a surge in oil prices threatens the earnings thesis. Southwest’s Reddit sentiment score sits at 32 out of 100, firmly bearish, and has been deteriorating since late March. WTI ... Southwest Airlines Dropped 20.89% in a Month as $104 Oil Threatens Its $4.00 EPS Target
